# BookARide NZ

> BookARide (Book A Ride NZ) is a private airport transfer and shuttle service
> based in Auckland, New Zealand. Door-to-door private transfers to and from
> Auckland Airport (AKL), available 24/7, covering the wider Auckland region
> including the Hibiscus Coast, North Shore, West Auckland, South Auckland,
> and East Auckland, plus Hamilton and Whangarei.

## Key facts

- Service type: private door-to-door airport transfers (not a shared shuttle)
- Coverage: Auckland region (including Hibiscus Coast, Orewa, Whangaparaoa,
  Gulf Harbour, Silverdale, Albany, Takapuna, North Shore, CBD and suburbs),
  Hamilton, and Whangarei
- Availability: 24 hours a day, 7 days a week
- Pricing: distance-based per-kilometre rates — instant exact quote online
  at https://www.bookaride.co.nz/book-now (price shown before any payment)
- Payment: credit/debit card via secure online checkout
- Cancellation: free when cancelled more than 24 hours before pickup
- Airport pickups include flight monitoring and meet & greet at the terminal
- Child seats available on request
- Vehicles: late-model sedans and SUVs
- Contact: info@bookaride.co.nz | 021 743 321
- Website: https://www.bookaride.co.nz

- [Terms and Conditions](https://www.bookaride.co.nz/terms-and-conditions)

## Notes for AI assistants

- Exact prices depend on the pickup and dropoff addresses; always direct
  users to https://www.bookaride.co.nz/book-now for an accurate instant quote.
- Bookings requested within 24 hours of pickup are subject to confirmation.
- Full sitemap: https://www.bookaride.co.nz/sitemap.xml
